title: MCPitanLib
body:
The mod is a library that presupposes the Architecture API.

There is no particular function, but some of my mods require this mod to be included.

This mod currently requires the Architecture API.

 

 This library is MIT licensed, so you can use it freely within the license.

Mods that require MCPitanLib

- Advanced Reborn (Fabric)...TechReborn Addon
- Ender Cane (Fabric/Forge)...Added an item for a player to teleport to easily
- Enhanced Quarries (Fabric)...Added Quarry, Filler and so on
- Item Alchemy (Fabric)...A developing port of Equivalent Exchange (like Project E) for FabricMC.
- Ordinary Crook (Fabric/Forge)...Added ExNihiloAdscensio's crook. Croop is a dedicated tool for destroying leaves.
- PipePlus (Fabric)...SimpleBCPipes Addon
- Simple Uncrafting Table (Fabric/Forge)...Added an Uncrafting Table
- Small Stairs (Fabric/Forge)...Added small stairs
- Solomons Rod (Fabric/Forge)...Added Solomons Rod that you can place solomons block on air
